rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase affects property tax appraisals and revenue, while §29.360 governs disbursement mechanics for educational assistance organizations. No operative conflict exists.
_note: While increasing the homestead exemption may indirectly reduce local school district property tax revenue, potentially affecting state budgetary contributions to education, §29.360 addresses only the procedural mechanics of program fund disbursements and contains no provision directly linked to the homestead exemption amount.
